description: Real error examples from Anthropic Claude API for reference

errors.raw_error: API Error: 401 ("type":"error","error" ("type"."authentication_error", message"."OAuth token has expired. Please obtain a new token or refresh your existing token.","request_id":"req_011CUp5WQxZAVPq6593o1spz")

error.message: OAuth token has expired. Please obtain a new token or refresh your existing token.

handling.user_message: API authentication failed. The API key may be expired or invalid. Please contact the system administrator to update the API key.

notes: Error is thrown by Claude SDK when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is expired or invalid
Error structure has type='error' and error.type='authentication_error'

errors.raw_error: API Error: 401 {"type":"error","error":{"type":"authentication_error","message":"OAuth token has expired. Please obtain a new token or refresh your existing token."},"request_id":"req_011CUz48pQWZpTmxoafdKB7A"}

error.message: OAuth token has expired. Please obtain a new token or refresh your existing token.

handling.parsed_message: OAuth token has expired. Please obtain a new token or refresh your existing token.
handling.user_help: Please run /login to re-authenticate with your Anthropic API key.

ui_display.message: OAuth token has expired. Please obtain a new token or refresh your existing token.
ui_display.help_text: Please run /login to re-authenticate with your Anthropic API key.

notes: Parsing: parseAnthropicError() extracts error.type, error.message, request_id
UI: Shows cleaned message + actionable help text + request ID for debugging
User action: /login command to refresh API key
